name: VESPRO LiveEssence
description: LiveEssence is a pristine clear liquid concentrate containing 37 types of colloidal aged & fermented nano digestive and metabolic enzymes from fruits, vegetables and starches, 78 types of Glacier water derived ionic trace minerals, and 20 types of colloidal amino acids from plants.
benefits: For Poor Digestion - only fermented and aged enzymes are bioactive and effective
For Toxic Blood - 100% non-herbal blood cleanser and alkalizer
For Skin Problems - excellent for acne, psoriasis, eczema and rashes
For Poor Energy - provides ATP energy producing minerals and enzymes
Vegetarian Support - provides crucial minerals/enzymes/amino acids lacking in vegetarian diet
Increases Blood Conductivity - improves nerve impulse transmission
Diabetic Support - regulates blood sugar and insulin sensitivity

dosage.therapeutic: 8 drops into large glass of water or juice (below 40°C)
dosage.general: 8 drops into large glass of water or juice (54 servings per 30ml bottle)

who_can_consume: Adults seeking trace mineral supplementation, those with poor digestion, skin problems, low energy, or diabetes support.
who_cannot_consume: Not specified. Consult a healthcare professional if pregnant, nursing, or have specific health conditions.

qa.question: What makes LiveEssence different from other trace mineral products?
qa.answer: LiveEssence uses 100% pure glacier water from Mount Rainier, Washington, USA (no dilution) as its mineral source. It is a pure concentrate requiring only 8-10 drops per serving. 100% colloidal minerals without any adulteration is always clear and has no particles or precipitation even when refrigerated for 3 years.

qa.question: What trace minerals are included?
qa.answer: LiveEssence contains 78 types of ionic trace minerals including Calcium, Magnesium, Iron, Zinc, Potassium, Sodium, and many more essential minerals derived from pristine virgin glaciers.
